production_approval.reason: Relaxed-gate DDOG debit-spread selector from runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260701T142520.495816000Z is a full_promotion_candidate after the production gate moved to a 5-trade new-symbol floor, 20% research DD cap, and 12% canary capital-DD cap. The run used the approved basket plus DDOG and produced 2317 trades, 127386 PnL, 69461 $25-cost PnL, 1.85 profit factor, 36.94% win rate, 4.94% capital DD on the 100k research budget, 10.22% $25-cost capital DD, 46.0% max symbol PnL share from TSLA, 20 symbol-ablation passes, and 1 strategy-ablation pass. Promotion comparison passed versus the current approved baseline runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260701T133838.229475000Z: $25-cost PnL improved by 355 over the 69106 baseline. DDOG contributes 36 direct trades, 1150 raw PnL, and 250 $25-cost PnL; remove_symbol:DDOG reverts to the prior approved baseline. Production remains limited to broker-reconciled Tradier put/call debit-spread entry and close lifecycle gates with account-sized budget controls.
